title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with dual AI processing for real-time control. Vietnam unveiled two humanoids including the Dyno for security and service work, while NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor for researchers. The video surveys the competitive landscape of humanoid robotics across multiple countries.
